title: Build your first Android app in AI Studio in 5 minutes
summary: Google's tutorial demonstrates building a native Android photography app in five minutes using Google AI Studio and Gemini 3.5 Flash. The workflow includes initial prompting, app prototyping, sideloading for testing, and bug fixes, with discussion of tradeoffs between PWA and native app development.
writeup: This tutorial from Google Cloud Tech walks through building a native Android photography app in five minutes using Google AI Studio and Gemini 3.5 Flash. The workflow moves from an initial prompt through app prototyping, sideloading for testing, and bug fixes. It also weighs the tradeoffs between PWA and native app development, showing where code generation fits in a rapid prototyping loop.
